"'''Living Force: Last Stand'''" is the final short story in the [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force campaign]]. It was written by [[August Hahn|August]] and [[Cynthia Hahn]] and was published on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website on [[February 1]], [[2007]]. It continued the saga of Darrus Jeht, following on from ''[[Living Force: One Minute to Midnight]]'', and concluding the story arc.<ref name="last stand" />

==Plot summary==
[[Darrus Jeht/Legends|Darrus Jeht]] returns to the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] shortly after [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]. Having disabled his ship's communications to prevent his clone troopers receiving their orders, they ambush two Republic vessels that are attacking starships containing fleeing Jedi from Almas. After successfully [[Battle of Cularin/Legends|defeating]] them, Jeht detects the ''[[Shadowblade]]'', a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] superweapon thought destroyed in a prior battle. Jeht commits his damaged ship to destroying the ''Shadowblade'', managing to suck the ship into a time rift traveling the system as a repercussion from earlier [[Darkstaff]] activity.<ref name="last stand" />
